title: Git init with per-repo personal identity
description: git init the repo root, then immediately set repo-local user.name/user.email to the personal identity (brooksryan / brooksryan19@gmail.com) before any commit. Global git config (work) stays untouched. Per ADR-0001: nothing in this repo's history may carry the work identity. Acceptance: first commit authored under the personal identity; `git config user.email` inside the repo returns the personal address; global config unchanged.
notes: HITL — mutating git op, Team Lead go required. Dependency ADR-0001 approved 2026-06-07 (satisfied). PRD-002 P1. Shipped 2026-06-07 (sprint_1 item S1-6); identity ratified as-is by Brooks.
